adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: minimax-1

model.title: Model
model.description: MiniMax-M3 supports a 1,000,000-token context window with text, image, and video input. Standard pricing is $0.30 input, $1.20 output, and $0.06 cache read per million tokens up to 512,000 input tokens, with each rate doubled above that threshold. MiniMax-M2.7 supports a 204,800-token context window with text input and costs $0.30 input, $1.20 output, $0.06 cache read, and $0.375 cache write per million tokens.

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: The default https://api.minimax.io/v1 is the global OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Other supported bases are https://api.minimax.io/anthropic for global Anthropic-compatible requests, https://api.minimaxi.com/v1 for China OpenAI-compatible requests, and https://api.minimaxi.com/anthropic for China Anthropic-compatible requests.

service_tier.title: Service Tier
service_tier.description: Priority requests receive priority admission and use 1.5 times the standard token and cache pricing.

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum output length, subject to the selected model's total context window.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.

enable_thinking.title: Enable Thinking
enable_thinking.description: Override the protocol default for MiniMax-M3. OpenAI-compatible requests default to adaptive thinking, while Anthropic-compatible requests default to disabled thinking. MiniMax-M2.7 always keeps thinking enabled.
